sentences.target: Je destine ce cadeau à ma sœur.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dɛstin sə kado a ma sœʁ/

translations.fr: Je destine ce cadeau à ma sœur.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dɛstin sə kado a ma sœʁ/
translations.en: I’m saving this gift for my sister.
translations.es: Guardo este regalo para mi hermana.
translations.de: Ich hebe dieses Geschenk für meine Schwester auf.
translations.it: Metto da parte questo regalo per mia sorella.
translations.ko: 이 선물을 여동생을 위해 아껴 두고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把这份礼物留给我妹妹。
translations.yue: 我留起呢份禮物畀我妹妹。
translations.ru: Я приберегаю этот подарок для своей сестры.
translations.pt: Estou guardando este presente para minha irmã.
translations.he: אני שומר את המתנה הזאת לאחותי.
translations.tr: Bu hediyeyi kız kardeşim için saklıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi để dành món quà này cho em gái tôi.
translations.nl: Ik bewaar dit cadeau voor mijn zus.
translations.uk: Я приберігаю цей подарунок для своєї сестри.
translations.hu: Ezt az ajándékot a lánytestvéremnek félreteszem.
translations.hi: मैं यह उपहार अपनी बहन के लिए बचा रहा हूं.
translations.pl: Odkładam ten prezent dla mojej siostry.
translations.el: Κρατάω αυτό το δώρο για την αδελφή μου.
translations.nb: Jeg legger denne gaven til side for søsteren min.
translations.id: Saya menyimpan hadiah ini untuk saudara perempuan saya.
translations.sv: Jag sparar den här presenten till min syster.
translations.ro: Păstrez acest cadou pentru sora mea.
translations.cs: Schovávám tento dárek pro svou sestru.
translations.da: Jeg gemmer denne gave til min søster.
translations.ja: このプレゼントは妹のために取っておきます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; refers to the speaker.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); means to designate/assign something. Takes a direct object ('ce cadeau') and a prepositional complement with 'à' marking the recipient.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'cadeau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'destine'.
Preposition introducing the recipient/beneficiary phrase 'à ma sœur'.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine singular form; modifies 'sœur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the prepositional complement, recipient of the gift.

sentences.target: On destine cette salle aux réunions.

translations.fr: On destine cette salle aux réunions.
translations.en: We’re using this room for meetings.
translations.de: Wir nutzen diesen Raum für Besprechungen.
translations.it: Usiamo questa sala per le riunioni.
translations.ru: Мы используем эту комнату для совещаний.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi dùng phòng này cho các cuộc họp.
translations.nl: We gebruiken deze ruimte voor vergaderingen.
translations.uk: Ми використовуємо цю кімнату для засідань.
translations.hi: हम यह कमरा बैठकों के लिए इस्तेमाल करते हैं.
translations.el: Χρησιμοποιούμε αυτήν την αίθουσα για συναντήσεις.
translations.nb: Vi bruker dette rommet til møter.
translations.id: Kami menggunakan ruangan ini untuk rapat.
translations.sv: Vi använder det här rummet för möten.
translations.da: Vi bruger dette rum til møder.
translations.ja: この部屋を会議に使っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; generic or colloquial 'we'.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular with 'on'); takes a direct object ('cette salle') and a prepositional complement specifying destination/purpose.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'destine'.
Preposition 'à' fused with the definite article 'les'; introduces the plural prepositional phrase 'aux réunions'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'aux', indicating the purpose for which the room is designated.

sentences.target: Nous destinons ces places aux enfants.

translations.fr: Nous destinons ces places aux enfants.
translations.en: We’re reserving these seats for the children.
translations.es: Reservamos estos asientos para los niños.
translations.de: Wir reservieren diese Plätze für die Kinder.
translations.ko: 이 좌석은 아이들을 위해 예약해 두고 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些座位是留给孩子们的。
translations.yue: 呢啲座位係留畀小朋友嘅。
translations.ru: Мы резервируем эти места для детей.
translations.pt: Reservamos estes lugares para as crianças.
translations.he: אנחנו שומרים את המקומות האלה לילדים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi dành những chỗ ngồi này cho trẻ em.
translations.nl: We reserveren deze plaatsen voor de kinderen.
translations.uk: Ми резервуємо ці місця для дітей.
translations.hu: Ezeket a helyeket a gyerekek számára foglaljuk.
translations.hi: हम ये सीटें बच्चों के लिए आरक्षित कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κρατάμε αυτές τις θέσεις για τα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi reserverer disse plassene til barna.
translations.id: Kursi ini kami sediakan untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Vi reserverar de här platserna för barnen.
translations.da: Vi reserverer disse pladser til børnene.
translations.ja: この席は子どもたちのために取ってあります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person plural); takes a direct object ('ces places') and a prepositional complement with 'aux' marking the beneficiaries.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'places'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'destinons'.
Preposition 'à' fused with 'les'; introduces the plural prepositional phrase 'aux enfants'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of 'aux', marking the recipients/beneficiaries.

sentences.target: Je veux destiner cet argent au loyer.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø dɛsti.ne sɛ taʁʒɑ̃ o lwaje/

translations.fr: Je veux destiner cet argent au loyer.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø dɛsti.ne sɛ taʁʒɑ̃ o lwaje/
translations.en: I want to put this money toward rent.
translations.es: Quiero destinar este dinero al alquiler.
translations.de: Ich möchte dieses Geld für die Miete verwenden.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想把这笔钱用在房租上。
translations.ru: Я хочу направить эти деньги на аренду.
translations.pt: Quero destinar este dinheiro ao aluguel.
translations.he: אני רוצה להקצות את הכסף הזה לשכר דירה.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn dành số tiền này cho tiền thuê nhà.
translations.nl: Ik wil dit geld aan de huur besteden.
translations.uk: Я хочу спрямувати ці гроші на оренду.
translations.hu: Ezt a pénzt a lakbérre szeretném fordítani.
translations.hi: मैं यह पैसा किराए के लिए लगाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę przeznaczyć te pieniądze na czynsz.
translations.el: Θέλω να διαθέσω αυτά τα χρήματα για το ενοίκιο.
translations.nb: Jeg vil bruke disse pengene til husleie.
translations.id: Saya ingin mengalokasikan uang ini untuk sewa rumah.
translations.sv: Jag vill lägga de här pengarna på hyran.
translations.ro: Vreau să folosesc banii aceștia pentru chirie.
translations.cs: Chci tyto peníze použít na nájem.
translations.da: Jeg vil bruge disse penge til husleje.
translations.ja: このお金を家賃に充てたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Modal/main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); selects an infinitival complement ('destiner').
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'veux'; takes a direct object ('cet argent') and a prepositional complement ('au loyer') indicating destination/purpose.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (form used before vowel sounds); modifies 'argent'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'destiner'.
Preposition 'à' fused with the definite article 'le'; introduces the singular prepositional phrase 'au loyer'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au', indicating the destination/purpose of the money.
